docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,219.44 FILED BY SIENKIEWICZ, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $ 0 SERVED FEB-18-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SC-109 AUTHORATION TO APPEAR ERIC UTLEY FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SC-105 REQUEST*** FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
CASE DISMISSED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT SC-105 MOTION TO QUASH GRANTED ON MARCH-20-2025

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY ALL PARTIES. DISMISSED FOR LACK OF JURISDICTION. SEE MOTION GRANTED BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SIENKIEWICZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR DISMISSAL W/O PREJUDICE RE: LACK OF JURISDICTION BY THE COURT
